message:
feat(wa-core): add screen state tracking and policy safety tests

New screen_state module:
- Track terminal alt-screen mode via escape sequence detection
- Parse ESC [ ? 1049 h/l (smcup/rmcup) and ESC [ ? 47 h/l sequences
- Eliminates need for Lua hooks, improving performance significantly
- ScreenStateTracker with process_output() and is_alt_screen() API

Core improvements:
- ingest.rs: Enhanced output ingestion with screen state integration
- policy.rs: Policy evaluation improvements
- runtime.rs: Runtime refinements
- suggestions.rs: Suggestion generation updates
- lib.rs: Export new screen_state module

New policy tests:
- policy_bypass.rs: Tests for policy bypass scenarios
- policy_safety.rs: Tests for safety-critical policy enforcement

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
